org.key_project.util.java

Class StringUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.java.StringUtil

  • public final class StringUtil
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides static methods to work with strings.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static char[] ADDITIONAL_ALLOWED_FILE_NAME_SYSTEM_CHARACTERS
      Additional characters allowed in file systems.
      static java.lang.String EMPTY_STRING
      Constant for an empty string.
      static java.lang.String LATIN_ALPHABET_BIG
      The latin alphabet with big capitals.
      static java.lang.String LATIN_ALPHABET_SMALL
      The latin alphabet with small capitals.
      static java.lang.String NEW_LINE
      Constant for a line break.
      static java.lang.String NUMERALS
      The numerals.
      static java.lang.String WHITESPACE
      All characters representing whitespace.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.lang.String chop(java.lang.String text, int maxLength)
      Chops the given text if required.
      static boolean contains(java.lang.String string, java.lang.CharSequence substring)
      Checks if the given string contains the substring.
      static java.util.Comparator<java.lang.String> createIgnoreCaseComparator()
      Creates a Comparator that can be used to compute the equality of two given Strings ignoring the case via String.compareToIgnoreCase(String).
      static boolean equalIgnoreWhiteSpace(java.lang.String first, java.lang.String second)
      Checks the equality of the given Strings ignoring whitespace.
      static java.lang.String fillString(java.lang.String text, char leadingCharacter, int length)
      Fills the given text with the leading character until it has the defined length.
      static boolean isEmpty(java.lang.String text)
      Checks if the String is empty.
      static boolean isNumber(java.lang.String val) 
      static boolean isTrimmedEmpty(java.lang.String text)
      Checks if the trimmed String is empty.
      static java.lang.String repeat(java.lang.String text, int repetitions)
      Creates a line which consists of the given text.
      static java.lang.String replaceAll(java.lang.String text, char[] toSearch, char toReplace)
      Replaces all occurrences of a search sign with the replacement sign.
      static boolean startsWith(java.lang.Object obj, java.lang.String prefix)
      Checks if the given Object is a String which starts with the given prefix.
      static java.lang.String toLowerCase(java.lang.String text)
      Nullpointer save execution of String.toLowerCase().
      static java.lang.String toSingleLinedString(java.lang.String text)
      Converts the optional multi lined String in a single lined String by replacing all line breaks and tabs with a space.
      static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text)
      Nullpointer save execution of String.trim()
      static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text, char c)
      Removes the given character c from the prefix/suffix of the given string.
      static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text, java.util.function.Predicate<java.lang.Character> predicate)
      Returns a string that first and last characters violates the given predicate.
      static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text, java.lang.String chars)
      Removes the given characters (in chars) from the prefix/suffix of the given string.
      static java.lang.String trimRight(java.lang.String text)
      Performs a trim only on the right side.
      static java.lang.String wrapLines(java.lang.String string)
      Wrap lines in a string.
      static java.lang.String wrapLines(java.lang.String string, int length)
      Wrap lines in a string.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • EMPTY_STRING

        public static final java.lang.String EMPTY_STRING
        Constant for an empty string.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • NEW_LINE

        public static final java.lang.String NEW_LINE
        Constant for a line break.

      • LATIN_ALPHABET_BIG

        public static final java.lang.String LATIN_ALPHABET_BIG
        The latin alphabet with big capitals.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • LATIN_ALPHABET_SMALL

        public static final java.lang.String LATIN_ALPHABET_SMALL
        The latin alphabet with small capitals.

      • ADDITIONAL_ALLOWED_FILE_NAME_SYSTEM_CHARACTERS

        public static final char[] ADDITIONAL_ALLOWED_FILE_NAME_SYSTEM_CHARACTERS
        Additional characters allowed in file systems.

        It is important that ':' is not contained because "::" is replaced with a '/' by the JFileChooser under Mac OS.

      • NUMERALS

        public static final java.lang.String NUMERALS
        The numerals.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • WHITESPACE

        public static final java.lang.String WHITESPACE
        All characters representing whitespace.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • isEmpty

        public static boolean isEmpty(java.lang.String text)
        Checks if the String is empty.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to check.
        Returns:
        true = text is null or empty, false = text is not empty.

      • isTrimmedEmpty

        public static boolean isTrimmedEmpty(java.lang.String text)
        Checks if the trimmed String is empty.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to check.
        Returns:
        true = text is null or trimmed empty, false = text is not empty.

      • trim

        public static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text)
        Nullpointer save execution of String.trim()
        Parameters:
        text - The text.
        Returns:
        The trimmed text.

      • toLowerCase

        public static java.lang.String toLowerCase(java.lang.String text)
        Nullpointer save execution of String.toLowerCase().
        Parameters:
        text - The text to convert.
        Returns:
        The text in lower case or null if the given text is null.

      • createIgnoreCaseComparator

        public static java.util.Comparator<java.lang.String> createIgnoreCaseComparator()
        Creates a Comparator that can be used to compute the equality of two given Strings ignoring the case via String.compareToIgnoreCase(String). If both values are null also 0 is returned in Comparator.compare(Object, Object). If only one value is null Comparator.compare(Object, Object) will return a value different to 0.
        Returns:
        The created Comparator.

      • repeat

        public static java.lang.String repeat(java.lang.String text,
                                      int repetitions)
        Creates a line which consists of the given text.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to repeate.
        repetitions - The number of repetitions.
        Returns:
        The created line.

      • contains

        public static boolean contains(java.lang.String string,
                               java.lang.CharSequence substring)

        Checks if the given string contains the substring.

        Attention: The empty string is contained in every string.

        Parameters:
        string - The string that should contain the substring.
        substring - The substring to check.
        Returns:
        true strings are not null and the string contains the substring, false if at least one string is null or the string does not contain the substring.

      • wrapLines

        public static java.lang.String wrapLines(java.lang.String string,
                                         int length)
        Wrap lines in a string. It replaces ' ' by '\n' such that (in general) every line is at most length characters long. If there are no spaces within length characters, then the long strings will not be broken and lines may be longer.
        Parameters:
        string - the string to break. May contain spaces and newline characters
        length - a positive number
        Returns:
        a string of the same length as the input in which some ' ' have been replaced by '\n'

      • wrapLines

        public static java.lang.String wrapLines(java.lang.String string)
        Wrap lines in a string. It replaces ' ' by '\n' such that (in general) every line is at most 100 characters long. If there are no spaces within 100 characters, then the long strings will not be broken and lines may be longer.
        Parameters:
        string - the string to break. May contain spaces and newline characters
        Returns:
        a string of the same length as the input in which some ' ' have been replaced by '\n'

      • toSingleLinedString

        public static java.lang.String toSingleLinedString(java.lang.String text)
        Converts the optional multi lined String in a single lined String by replacing all line breaks and tabs with a space.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to convert.
        Returns:
        The single lined text.

      • replaceAll

        public static java.lang.String replaceAll(java.lang.String text,
                                          char[] toSearch,
                                          char toReplace)
        Replaces all occurrences of a search sign with the replacement sign.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to search and replace in.
        toSearch - The signs to search.
        toReplace - The sign to replace with.
        Returns:
        The new created String.

      • equalIgnoreWhiteSpace

        public static boolean equalIgnoreWhiteSpace(java.lang.String first,
                                            java.lang.String second)
        Checks the equality of the given Strings ignoring whitespace.
        Parameters:
        first - The first String.
        second - The second String.
        Returns:
        true equal ignoring whitespace, false different.

      • fillString

        public static java.lang.String fillString(java.lang.String text,
                                          char leadingCharacter,
                                          int length)
                                   throws java.lang.IllegalArgumentException
        Fills the given text with the leading character until it has the defined length.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to fill.
        leadingCharacter - The leading character to use.
        length - The length to fill up to.
        Returns:
        The created text.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - If the text is already longer as the given length

      • trimRight

        public static java.lang.String trimRight(java.lang.String text)
        Performs a trim only on the right side.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to trim its right side.
        Returns:
        The trimmed text.

      • chop

        public static java.lang.String chop(java.lang.String text,
                                    int maxLength)
        Chops the given text if required.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to check.
        maxLength - The maximal length to ensure.
        Returns:
        The text considering the maximal length.

      • startsWith

        public static boolean startsWith(java.lang.Object obj,
                                 java.lang.String prefix)
        Checks if the given Object is a String which starts with the given prefix.
        Parameters:
        obj - The Object to check.
        prefix - The prefix to check for.
        Returns:
        true Object is String with given prefix, false otherwise.

      • isNumber

        public static boolean isNumber(java.lang.String val)

      • trim

        @Nonnull
public static java.lang.String trim(@Nonnull
                                             java.lang.String text,
                                             @Nonnull
                                             java.util.function.Predicate<java.lang.Character> predicate)
        Returns a string that first and last characters violates the given predicate. Works similar to String.trim() but allows to specify the characters that should be consider for removal. The given predicate test the characters, if true the character is removed.

      • trim

        @Nonnull
public static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text,
                                             char c)
        Removes the given character c from the prefix/suffix of the given string.
        See Also:
        trim(String, Predicate)

      • trim

        @Nonnull
public static java.lang.String trim(java.lang.String text,
                                             java.lang.String chars)
        Removes the given characters (in chars) from the prefix/suffix of the given string.
        See Also:
        trim(String, Predicate)
